description: You are the athletic trainer for the Westbrook University basketball team, logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as admin (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Set up the off-season strength and conditioning program by creating three training routines: "Phase 1 - Anatomical Adaptation" (Description: "Weeks 1-4: Movement quality and work capacity foundation") with training days "Upper Body Foundations" (Monday) and "Lower Body Foundations" (Thursday); "Phase 2 - Maximal Strength" (Description: "Weeks 5-8: Heavy compound lifts for peak force production") with training days "Heavy Upper" (Tuesday) and "Heavy Lower" (Friday); and "Phase 3 - Power Development" (Description: "Weeks 9-12: Explosive movements and sport-specific power") with training days "Explosive Upper" (Monday) and "Explosive Lower" (Wednesday). All names, descriptions, and day assignments must be exact.
